name: [GRIDHAND] Onboarding Agent - Day 3 → check-in SMS asking about experience

gridhand.scenario: Day 3 → check-in SMS asking about experience
gridhand.description: When a customer visits a business, such as a barbershop, and makes a purchase, our automation workflow is triggered to send a follow-up SMS on the third day after their visit, checking in to ask about their experience and gather feedback. This SMS, sent via a integrated messaging app like Twilio, is timed to arrive at 2 PM, a quiet period for most small businesses, allowing the owner to quickly review and respond to any customer concerns, and is designed to help the business owner identify areas for improvement and build customer loyalty. By leveraging this automated check-in, the business owner can increase customer retention and encourage positive online reviews, ultimately driving more sales and growth for their barbershop.
